title: We'll Miss You Mentors <3
author: Shireen
message: Thank you for an amazing year mentors, you have made this year so much more enjoyable. My favorite events were Mexican dinner and Beach day. I really appreciate all the time and effort you all have put into this, it must not have been easy but I appreciate every bit of it and you have all been such nice and amazing people and have made these events hundred times more enjoyable with your amazing energy. I'll miss you guys and the amazing events next year and I wish you the best for your future.
